title: Dress to Impress
wikitext:
[]: Dress to Impress             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jan 10, 2010 2:24 pm As I was gathering screenshots for the change in Gendou thread, I came across a rather interesting tidbit, which perhaps has larger implications. By default, Naoko Akagi wears a green turtleneck jumper. This is her default uniform and is seen in almost all of her scenes. [wkimg width=200]21 C136 naoko.jpg[/wkimg] [wkimg width=200]21 akagis meet Rei.jpg[/wkimg] [wkimg width=200]21 naoko ritsuko final.jpg[/wkimg] However, there is one important exception to this. In the scene where Naoko kisses Gendou in the command center, her attire is slightly altered. She is wearing a set of pearls and her jumper is now in fact purple. [wkimg width=200]21 gendo naoko meeting.jpg[/wkimg] [wkimg width=200]21 gendo naoko kiss wide.jpg[/wkimg] My thinking is that the purple jumper is an overt reference to Yui's default attire* [wkimg width=200]21 yui fuyutsuki look.jpg[/wkimg] That is to say, it is likely that Naoko is "dressing to impress" here, impress Gendou in particular. She has worn a set of pearls and garbed herself in a similar outfit to Gendou's lost wife, to evoke a better response presumably. The reason I bring this up here is that the above change in attire holds meaning for the context of Gendo and Naoko's conversation here. Related to recent discussion in these two threads, given this evidence it is likely that this scene is in fact the beginning of Gendou and Naoko's affair. Naoko has worn her best jewellery, and garbed herself in attire nigh identical to Yui's in order to better seduce Gendou. If this is true, then the context of their words here becomes clearer Episode #21' wrote: AKAGI (OFF) : Are you really sure? IKARI : Yes, I have no regrets concerning my work. AKAGI : Liar! You just can't forget about Ms. Yui, right? But I don't mind.

[]:             Quote Post by J_Faulkner » Sun Jan 10, 2010 2:44 pm From the pictures you've posted, it seems that Naoko's jumper is more pink than the purple jumper Yui is seen to wear, so there's not an exact correspondence. Perhaps Naoko just wore pink-purple (together with the necklace) to reflect her amorous intentions. Naoko also wears a lab coat like Yui, but then again, that's the standard clothing. Also, everyone else in the pictures seems to be wearing turtleneck jumpers at some point - black one for Gendo and Ritsuko looks like she's got a blue one - so it's perhaps not surprising that Naoko has one too just like Yui. Maybe they all shop at the same clothes store, which only sells turtleneck jumpers and lab coats. So I'm not convinced that Naoko is trying to look like Yui before she jumped on Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Sun Jan 10, 2010 2:57 pm OMF wrote: By default, Naoko Akagi wears a green turtleneck jumper. […]She is wearing a set of pearls and her jumper is now in fact purple.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Jan 10, 2010 2:58 pm lolwut? Take it from a gay man, there is no "pink" in that thing Naoko is wearing. It's only like two or three shades away from the purple Yui wears. It's such an obvious connection, now that it's pointed out. I believe Naoko wears this purple in her confrontation with Rei, too, meaning that this happened mere moments after she shagged the Commander.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jan 10, 2010 3:01 pm EDIT: Never mind.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jan 10, 2010 3:03 pm AuraTwilight wrote: I believe Naoko wears this purple in her confrontation with Rei, too, meaning that this happened mere moments after she shagged the Commander.

[]:             Quote Post by J_Faulkner » Sun Jan 10, 2010 3:06 pm AuraTwilight wrote: lolwut? Take it from a gay man, there is no "pink" in that thing Naoko is wearing. It's only like two or three shades away from the purple Yui wears. It's such an obvious connection, now that it's pointed out.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jan 10, 2010 3:07 pm J_Faulkner wrote: I'm not gay, but I can distinguish colors as well as a gay person.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jan 10, 2010 3:10 pm J_Faulkner wrote: I'm not gay, but I can distinguish colors as well as a gay person.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Sun Jan 10, 2010 3:11 pm AuraTwilight wrote: I believe Naoko wears this purple in her confrontation with Rei, too, meaning that this happened mere moments after she shagged the Commander.

[]:             Quote Post by J_Faulkner » Sun Jan 10, 2010 3:11 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: I don't think Aura was referring to you.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jan 10, 2010 5:06 pm I'd say Naoko's is purple to Yui's violet, actually... But yes, the fact that she's obviously dressed up for just that one scene marks it as an important effort on her part. I don't see any particular reason for this to be day 1 of the relationship though, rather than just the latest iteration of an old issue.

[]: Re: Dress to Impress             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Jan 10, 2010 5:07 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: [*] "Yes, I have no regrets concerning my work." A more difficult line. Perhaps Gendou is responding to an earlier query of Naoko's mentioning Yui? Perhaps her question involved whether Gendou would want a relationship with a co-worker after what happened to Yui? Highly speculative. I'd like to hear other opinions on this one.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Jan 10, 2010 7:56 pm Yui has a pink shirt in EoE, both in the scene where she says goodbye to Shinji and the one before Eva-01 puts the chomp down on Gendo. (That scene has her shirt change to the purple turtleneck before the phantom Eva-01 bites his head off). She's associated with both colors. Naoko's turtleneck appears a slight shade different from Yui's, but it's hard to make out in the lighting. It does appear to have been a deliberate attempt to look more like Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Jan 10, 2010 10:02 pm Very nice find. The shirt reinforces her contention that Gendo still has Yui on the brain.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jan 10, 2010 10:38 pm The hairstyle/color works for her in that regard as well. By that token, Ritsuko at least makes a solid attempt to make him care for her purely on her own merits, intentionally separating herself from both Yui and her mother where possible... She doesn't even wear the official Nerv turtlenecks.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Jan 11, 2010 5:20 am I feel like idiot for never realizing this. Guess I never paid attention to clothes

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Jan 11, 2010 1:05 pm Yui is gonna be mad, that mean old hag is trying to move in on her man by well looking like her. If Yui is within Eva 01 at this time, could she have known what was going on but listening via the eva or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Jan 11, 2010 3:28 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: If Yui is within Eva 01 at this time, could she have known what was going on but listening via the eva or something?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jan 11, 2010 3:38 pm Considering the whole "bite you in half" thing, I think it's fair to say she knew.
